titleStmt.title: SII 8.284: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 284. (A.R. No. 15 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3ṟāvatu vaṭa
karai virutarācapayaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu meṟkāṉāṭṭu piramatecam tiṭṭaikuṭiyāṉa tirucciṟṟampalac
caruppetimaṅkalattu Ūruṭait tiruttāṉtoṉṟīśvaramuṭaiya ṉāyaṉārkku milāṭākiya ceṉanāta
vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟūrkūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷūril ciṟupākkamuṭaiyāṉ cempaiṉāyakaṉ Irājarājatevaṉāna
Irājarājamakataiṉāṭāḻvāṉeṉ Ittevaṟkku muṉṟāvatu ṉāḷile coḻamaṇṭalam Iṭaṅkai valaṅkaiyā
y Iṉṉāyaṉārkku kuṟumpeṟiyak kāverikku vaṭakaraiyil kañcaṉūrakarattile viṭṭukkoṭu Iruntu kuṟu
mpeṟintu nirai koṇṭa Āṭum māṭum Erumaiyuṅ kiṭāvum Iṉṉāyaṉār tiruttāṉtoṉṟīcuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār
kku tirunuṉtāviḷakkukku kuṭutta Urukkaḷil tirunuṉtāviḷakku Iraṇṭukku Uṭalāka nikkiṉa pacu nāṟpatum ni
kki Āṭum māṭum Erumaiyuṅ kiṭāvum viṟṟu mutalāṉa kācu 4 100 8 10 Ikkācu nāṉūṟ ṟeṇpatum Ittirut
tāṉtoṉṟīcuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil kāṇiuṭaiya civappirāmaṇaril pāratāyaṉ Amaranāyakaṉu
m Ivaṉ ciṟṟappaṉ makaṉ tiruveṇṇāmalaiuṭaiyaperumāḷāṉa tillaināyakapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi muṭiko
ṇṭāṉāṉa poṟkoyilpaṭṭaṉum vācciyaṉ Amaranāyakaṉāṉa periyaāṉāṉa kulottuṅkapaṭṭa
ṉum Ivaṉ tampi Iṉiyāṉāṉa Irājarājapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi veḷḷaivāraṇamāṉa civakalli yāṇapaṭṭa
ṉum Ivaṉ tampi tiruttoṇipuramuṭaiyāṉāṉa dakṣaṇāmūrttipaṭṭaṉum
civatevapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi muṭikoṇṭa
Oṉṟukku pacu muppattiraṇṭāka tirunuṉtāviḷakku Iraṇṭukku pacu Aṟupattunālukku kaikkoṇṭa pa
cu nāṟpatum nikki pacu Irupattunālukkum pacu Oṉṟukku kācu patiṉaiñcāka pacu Irupattunālukku Okka koṇṭa kā
cu 3 100 6 10 . Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
The end of this line and of the next are completely worn out.
Digital edition of SII 8.284 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
